sessions.content: Hi I'm Sarah. I work as a pediatric nurse at St Marys Hospital in Boston.
How long have you been nursing?
About 8 years. I specialize in neonatal care. I have two kids Emma 7 and Jake 4.
Balancing work with two young children sounds busy.
My husband Mark is a high school history teacher so our schedules are wild.
I've been training for the Boston Marathon. Goal is to finish under 4 hours.
How is training going?
Pretty well. I run about 40 miles a week. I drive a blue Honda Odyssey minivan.
Makes sense with two kids.
We live in Newton Massachusetts. I grew up in Portland Oregon.
Emma started second grade and wants to be a veterinarian.
Does she have any pets?
Yes we have a golden retriever named Biscuit age 3. Jake loves dinosaurs and Legos.
Classic 4-year-old interests.
I also play violin in a community orchestra on weekends. Favorite food is Thai cuisine.

sessions.content: Hey I'm David Chen a software engineer at Google in Seattle Im 32.
What do you work on at Google?
I work on the Maps team. Been there 5 years before that Amazon for 2 years.
Did you study computer science?
Yes at UC Berkeley graduated in 2014. I'm originally from San Francisco.
I moved to Seattle for Google. I live in Capitol Hill neighborhood and I'm single.
Capitol Hill is a great area.
Love it. I hike in the Cascades almost every weekend and drive a Tesla Model 3.
Perfect for the Pacific Northwest.
I also play basketball twice a week. I have a cat named Pixel who is 2 years old.
My mom is a doctor in San Francisco and my dad is a retired professor of mathematics at Stanford.
Quite an academic family.
I'm learning Japanese right now. I want to travel to Japan next spring.
That sounds wonderful.
My favorite programming language is Python. I contribute to open source projects.

questions.answer: retired professor of mathematics at Stanford

sessions.content: Hi I'm Maria Rodriguez a high school Spanish teacher in Austin Texas. I'm 45.
How long have you been teaching?
18 years. I teach at Westlake High School and coach the soccer team.
Full schedule!
I'm married to Carlos who owns a Mexican restaurant called El Jardin downtown.
We have three kids Sofia 16 Miguel 13 and Lucia 9. Sofia is applying to colleges.
Where is Sofia hoping to go?
UT Austin is her top choice. She wants to study biology. We have a tabby cat named Mango.
Cute name.
I drive a red Toyota RAV4. We own our home in Tarrytown neighborhood of Austin.
I grew up in San Antonio and got my teaching degree from UT Austin.
So Austin has special meaning for you.
My hobby is salsa dancing. Carlos and I go every Friday night.
Sounds wonderful.
I'm also learning Italian. Dream to take family to Italy next summer.

sessions.content: I'm James Walker a retired Marine Corps colonel 58 years old. I live in San Diego.
Thank you for your service. What did you do after retiring?
I consult for defense contractors and teach military history at community college part-time.
What branch did you serve in?
Infantry. I served for 30 years. Last posting at Camp Pendleton so I stayed in San Diego.
I'm widowed. My wife Patricia passed away four years ago from cancer.
I'm so sorry for your loss.
Thank you. My son Robert is a lawyer in Chicago. My daughter Karen is an ER doctor in Phoenix.
They've done very well.
I have a German Shepherd named Ranger. I drive a black Ford F-150 truck.
I love woodworking in my garage making furniture. I also fish on weekends off the coast.
Sounds relaxing.
I grew up in rural Tennessee. Still have family there. I visit every Thanksgiving.
Family traditions are important.
I'm a huge San Diego Padres fan. Season tickets for the last 10 years.

sessions.content: Hi I'm Priya Sharma a data scientist at Netflix in Los Gatos California. I'm 29.
What do you work on at Netflix?
Recommendation algorithms. Been there 3 years. Before that I did my PhD at MIT in statistics.
Impressive!
My undergrad was at IIT Bombay in India where I'm originally from.
I live in San Jose in Willow Glen neighborhood with roommate Aisha who is a nurse.
Nice area.
I don't own a car and commute by train. I cycle weekends and do yoga every morning.
Very healthy lifestyle.
My parents still live in Mumbai. I visit them every December for about three weeks.
I love photography and cooking Indian food. I have a food Instagram with 12000 followers.
Quite a following.
I also volunteer at a coding bootcamp for underprivileged youth on Saturdays.
Admirable work.
My favorite travel destination is Japan. I went last year and absolutely loved it.

sessions.content: Hey I'm Tom Kowalski a plumber running my own business in Cleveland Ohio. I'm 41.
How long have you been running your own business?
12 years. I employ 4 other plumbers now. My wife Linda is an accountant who does the books.
Entrepreneurship suits you.
I started after working for a larger company for 5 years. Best decision I ever made.
We live in Lakewood suburb of Cleveland. We have a rescue pit bull named Bruno age 4.
Rescue dogs are the best.
We have two daughters Ashley 14 and Brooke 11. No sons.
A full house!
I drive a white Chevy Silverado. Linda drives a Subaru Forester.
I'm a massive Cleveland Browns fan. Season tickets for 15 years. Love ice fishing too.
Ice fishing on Lake Erie?
Exactly. I go almost every winter weekend. I also coach Ashley's softball team.
You stay busy.
Always. I grew up in Pittsburgh which is funny given I'm a Browns fan.

sessions.content: I'm Elena Petrov a violinist with the Chicago Symphony Orchestra. I'm 36 from Russia.
How long have you been with the CSO?
8 years. I moved from St Petersburg when I got the position.
What a journey!
I started violin at age 4. I studied at St Petersburg Conservatory then Juilliard in New York.
I live in Lincoln Park neighborhood of Chicago. I'm with Antoine a French chef.
A musician and a chef!
Antoine owns a French restaurant called Maison in Wicker Park. The food is incredible.
Delightful.
I take the CTA everywhere. We have two cats Chopin and Liszt. I don't own a car.
Outside music I love reading mostly Russian literature. I run 5K most mornings.
Running keeps you energized for performances?
Exactly. I teach private violin lessons Monday and Wednesday evenings. Six students.
Giving back to the next generation.
Very fulfilling. I go back to Russia every summer to visit my mother in St Petersburg.

sessions.content: Hi I'm Marcus Johnson a high school football coach and PE teacher in Atlanta. I'm 48.
Have you always been in education?
Yes 22 years. I coach at Grady High School. We won the state championship two years ago.
State champions!
Proudest moment of my career. I played college ball at Georgia Tech before an injury ended it.
I'm divorced. My son Marcus Jr. is 19 and plays college football.
Like father like son.
He plays for Clemson. I live alone in East Atlanta Village neighborhood.
Vibrant area.
I drive a silver Dodge RAM. I have a Labrador named Tackle. He's 5 years old.
I'm a huge Atlanta Falcons fan. Also love grilling. Known for my BBQ ribs.
Sounds delicious.
I do a cookout every Fourth of July for about 50 people. I lift weights every morning at 5am.
Serious dedication.
Gotta model what I teach. I grew up in Savannah Georgia. My mom still lives there.

sessions.content: Hello I'm Yuki Tanaka a UX designer at Airbnb in San Francisco. I'm 27 Japanese-American.
How long have you been at Airbnb?
Almost 2 years. Before that a startup for a year after my design degree from RISD.
Excellent school.
I loved it. From San Jose originally. My parents moved from Osaka Japan before I was born.
I live in the Mission District with two roommates. I take BART and bike to work.
Very SF!
I love it. I'm vegetarian and cook Japanese food at home. No car.
Very walkable city.
I have a pet rabbit named Mochi. He's very spoiled. I'm single and loving it.
My hobbies are ceramics and rock climbing. I go to a climbing gym three times a week.
Both very creative activities.
I also do watercolor painting. I sell prints on Etsy.
A side business!
A small one. I visit my grandparents in Osaka every other year. Going this December.

sessions.content: I'm Robert Hayes a retired professor of economics from University of Michigan. I'm 67.
How long were you at Michigan?
34 years. I retired two years ago. I specialized in macroeconomics and monetary policy.
Distinguished career. What are you doing in retirement?
Writing a book on Federal Reserve policy history. I also consult for the IMF.
My wife Dorothy is a retired federal judge. We've been married 41 years. We live in Ann Arbor.
Ann Arbor is wonderful.
We love it. Eldest son William is a cardiologist in Boston.
Accomplished family!
Second is Claire a professor of literature at Duke. Third is Daniel a tech entrepreneur in Austin.
We have four grandchildren and I absolutely dote on them. I drive a navy blue Volvo XC90.
Safe choice for a grandfather.
I play golf twice a week and I'm in a book club that meets monthly. I also garden extensively.
A full and lovely retirement.
I grew up in rural Kentucky. Still have the accent. My parents were tobacco farmers.

questions.answer: a book on Federal Reserve policy history
